responsibilities: Developed a Graph-RAG Agent integrating Neo4j with SAP ERP data, enabling Text-to-SQL/Cypher capabilities to autonomously execute complex multi-table joins.
Architected a high-throughput IDP Pipeline for engineering RFQs using PaddleOCR served via FastAPI, implementing geometric alignment and layout-preserving Markdown conversion to feed LLM inference.
Engineered a Hybrid Extraction Logic combining GenAI reasoning with a Spatial Template System, achieving sub-second processing for recurring drawing layouts by bypassing redundant LLM calls.
Built an industrial Multimodal RAG System leveraging LLaMA 3 (8B/70B), MinIO, and VectorDB, deploying hierarchical retrieval to achieve machine-level semantic accuracy across maintenance documents.
Consolidated Edge AI Perception on NVIDIA Jetson (ROS2), fusing GroundingDINO, SAM, and RGB-D data for open-vocabulary navigation while managing YOLOv8 training pipelines.

major_projects.name: Enterprise Graph-RAG & Text-to-SQL for SAP ERP
major_projects.problem_statement: Enabling high-fidelity semantic retrieval and natural-language querying across complex SAP ERP datasets.
major_projects.solution_summary: Modeled complex SAP ERP relational schemas into Neo4j and built an end-to-end Graph-RAG backend. Engineered a Text-to-SQL/Cypher orchestration layer on on-prem NVIDIA DGX systems. Integrated Azure SSO (OIDC/SAML) and hardened FastAPI middleware.
major_projects.measurable_outcomes: Achieved sub-second latency for autonomous multi-table joins. Supported thousands of concurrent enterprise requests under strict security constraints.
major_projects.business_impact: Enabled natural-language queries to execute autonomous multi-table joins and high-fidelity semantic retrieval across deeply joined enterprise datasets.

major_projects.name: Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) for Engineering RFQs
major_projects.problem_statement: Developing a high-throughput OCR and metadata extraction pipeline for heterogeneous engineering drawings with cost optimization.
major_projects.solution_summary: Built a high-throughput OCR and metadata extraction pipeline for heterogeneous engineering drawings using PaddleOCR and optimized FastAPI services. Developed computer vision algorithms for deskewing, region segmentation, and spatial coordinate mapping. Implemented a spatial template-matching engine to bypass LLM inference for recurring formats.
major_projects.measurable_outcomes: Optimized FastAPI services for internal scale. Significantly reduced compute cost on local hardware.
major_projects.business_impact: Enabled consistent extraction across variable customer layouts and efficient processing of engineering RFQs.

major_projects.name: Industrial-Grade Maintenance Chatbot (Sovereign AI)
major_projects.problem_statement: Providing a domain-grounded troubleshooting chatbot for industrial clients with sovereign data control.
major_projects.solution_summary: Architected a fully on-prem RAG backend deployed on NVIDIA DGX servers. Orchestrated ingestion from MinIO and MongoDB and indexed maintenance documentation with Nemotron-based retrieval. Delivered a production-ready chatbot with hierarchical chunking, vector search, and Azure SSO.
major_projects.business_impact: Ensured sovereign data control for industrial clients and provided domain-grounded troubleshooting.

major_projects.name: Edge AI & Perceptual Navigation for Quadruped Robotics
major_projects.problem_statement: Enabling autonomous navigation for quadruped robotics via text prompts and accurate spatial goal poses with real-time obstacle avoidance.
major_projects.solution_summary: Deployed zero-shot visual grounding on NVIDIA Jetson within a ROS2 stack. Integrated SAM2 with RealSense RGB-D to construct a semantic object map in Neo4j. Optimized the real-time perception-to-control pipeline.
major_projects.measurable_outcomes: Achieved an 87% target reacquisition rate. Enabled navigation to spatial goal poses with 15cm accuracy. Reduced detection latency to 120ms for high-speed obstacle avoidance.
major_projects.business_impact: Enabled autonomous navigation and high-speed obstacle avoidance for quadruped robotics.
